chapter_title.en: The Severity of a Believer’s Afflictions

text: 24 - عن يزيد بن خليفة عن أبي عبد الله (ع) قال: ما قضى الله تبارك وتعالى لمؤمن من قضاءً الاّ جعل له الخيرةَ فيما قضى.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 24. It has been narrated that Yazid ibn Khalifah said that Abu 'Abd Allah (a.s) said: Allah never decrees anything for a believer but that He makes His decree the best for him.
